title: salix × tomentella
intro: Salix × tomentella, also known as Tomentillo, is a hybrid plant species within the willow family (Salicaceae) resulting from the cross between Salix fragilis and Salix alba. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × tomentella include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from colds and flu to skin conditions and wounds.
